message:
fix(process): correct ambient-cx assertion direction in spawned-task test

The test was asserting !has_ambient_cx (spawned tasks run without
ambient cx) when the correct expectation is has_ambient_cx (spawned
tasks DO inherit the ambient cx from their parent scope). The assertion
was backwards, making the test pass vacuously when the feature worked
correctly and fail only when it was broken — the opposite of useful.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
